name: 夏家拳馆
description: 上海闸北的百年武馆，馆主夏三虎被发现死在内宅。

visual.prompt: 1914 Shanghai martial arts school, traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting

name: 内宅区域
description: 夏家拳馆内宅，有夏叔娥房、夏三虎房、夏仲鹏房、库房、空屋。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese mansion inner court, bedrooms, oil painting style, dim lighting

name: 外院区域
description: 夏家拳馆外院，有客厅、食堂、宿舍、室内练武馆、外院、大型练武场、器械场。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese martial arts school outer court, training grounds, oil painting style
